name: Friskies Cat Salmon Gravy 85g
description: Specially crafted with quality protein for muscle health, and without any added artificial colourants, flavourings, or preservatives, this meal supports vitality and well-being. Suitable for adult cats, including neutered cats, and backed by over 1,000 daily ingredient and production quality checks to ensure safety and consistency. Key Benefits • 100% complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats. • Quality protein for health, strength, and vitality. • No added artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives. • Suitable for neutered cats. • Developed by Purina’s expert nutritionists. • Made with trusted, carefully selected ingredients. Ingredients Meat and animal derivatives, cereals, fish and fish derivatives (salmon 4%), minerals, various sugars. Guaranteed Analysis • Vitamin A: 541 IU/kg • Vitamin D3: 83 IU/kg • Iron (Fe): 19 mg/kg • Iodine (I): 0.24 mg/kg • Copper (Cu): 2.14 mg/kg • Manganese (Mn): 3.7 mg/kg • Zinc (Zn): 31 mg/kg Feeding Instructions For an average adult cat (4 kg), feed 4 pouches per day in 2 separate
